idea-plugin.name: Brikk SQL
idea-plugin.description: Cross-dialect SQL transpilation inside DataGrip/IntelliJ, powered by brikk-sql (a full Kotlin port of sqlglot). Mark any SQL with -- dialect: xyz and execute it against the current engine through transpilation, or transpile any SQL between mysql, doris, trino, presto, duckdb, postgres, and clickhouse — with preview, in-place replacement, exact unsupported-node diagnostics, and native-parser validation.

action.description: Transpiles the selection (or dialect-marker block, or whole file) to a picked target dialect, with preview and diagnostics
Picks the source dialect explicitly (overriding detection), then transpiles into the file's current dialect
